[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000010 2
1 11111011 7
2 01100101 4
3 11111111 a
4 01000101 3
5 01011010 4
6 11111011 7
7 01100101 4

01 10 01011111 6
12 21 01011111 6
23 32 11111011 7 match 1 6
34 43 11111111 a match 3
45 54 11101101 6
56 65 10111000 4
67 76 00011000 2
70 07 01011111 6

02 20 01010111 5
13 31 11111111 a match 3
24 42 01100111 5
35 53 11111011 7 match 1 6
46 64 01111101 6
57 75 10111000 4
60 06 01011111 6
71 17 01011101 5

14 41 01111101 6
25 52 11101010 5
36 63 11111011 7 match 1 6
47 74 01111101 6
50 05 11111111 a match 3
61 16 01011101 5
72 27 01011010 4 match 5

04 40 01110111 6
15 51 11111101 7
26 62 01011010 4 match 5
37 73 11111011 7 match 1 6
